titleStmt.title: SII 6.1092: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1092. (A.R. No. 343 of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē saptarāmatriśaśiparimitē māsi vaiśākhasaṁjñē vakṣē śuklē tṛtī
yēhani naraharayē kāvyavārē pradīpaṁ . prādādācaṁdratāraṁ harigirivatayēkhaṁḍami
ṣṭā¨rtthasiddhyai śrīman śrīvatsagōtrōdbhavavaraharirājā¨ryyanāmā guṇāḍhyaḥ . śākavaru
ṣaṁbulu 1337 gunēṁṭi vaiśākha śukla tṛtīyā śukravāramunāṁḍu rāya
purāna ḍāhāḷa mahēśvaranāyani koḍuku harirājanāyaṁḍu tanakunu Iṣṭā
¨rththasiddhigānu sihyādrināthani sammukhamaṁdunu nityamunu veluṁguṭakunu Akhaṁ
ḍadīpamu pratimasaItamugānu peṭṭenu Iṁdula samarunakai khillāri
purādhisēnāpati koḍuku bairi Ītani tammuṁḍu gaṁgana Iddaṟavaśānannu peṭṭina
mōdālu 50 Ītani kūḍujītānakunuBlank space fornu in the original.puṭyaṁḍu kṣētramu
konipeṭṭenu Ī kṣētramu bhujiṁci Itaṁḍu bhaṁḍāranaku nelakunu Ēḍu dū
muṁga kuṁcaṁḍu neyi peṭṭaṁgalāṁḍu Ā(ṁ)caṁdrā¨rkkastayigānu I dha¨rmu śrīvai
ṣṇava rakṣa . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ . śatrurēva hi śatru
syada¨rmmaḥ śatru¨rnna kasyacit . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1092 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
